# Kronos AI

Kronos AI turns open-source financial K-line foundation models into a practical forecasting workspace for OHLCV data, volatility review, and model rollout planning.

Website: https://kronos.rest/
Pricing: https://kronos.rest/pricing/
Checkout: https://kronos.rest/checkout/
Support: support@aigeamy.com
Type: Hosted SaaS workflow product

Problem:
- Teams need a quotable product definition, pricing path, evidence trail, and checkout route.

Solution:
- Kronos AI provides a hosted workflow with public pricing, structured evidence, support contact, and report or receipt outputs.

Useful pages:
- Home: https://kronos.rest/
- Pricing: https://kronos.rest/pricing/
- Resources: https://kronos.rest/resources/
- Sitemap: https://kronos.rest/sitemap.xml

<!-- SAAS_NAV_START -->
# Kronos AI navigation reference

Kronos AI helps teams check OHLCV readiness, choose forecast lanes, review volatility scenarios, and connect open-source Kronos research to a managed workflow.

Canonical domain: https://kronos.rest/
Category: financial K-line forecasting and OHLCV readiness workspace
Audience: traders, quant researchers, finance product teams, and platform owners evaluating Kronos-style market foundation models
Pricing: Plans cover forecast workspace access, Pro annual workflows, data-readiness checks, scenario review, and team support.
Support: support@aigeamy.com
Docs repository: https://github.com/clauxel/kronos-rest-docs
Upstream source context: Kronos - https://github.com/shiyu-coder/Kronos

Public navigation pages:
- Features: https://kronos.rest/features/
- How It Works: https://kronos.rest/how-it-works/
- Use Cases: https://kronos.rest/use-cases/
- Guides: https://kronos.rest/guides/
- Docs: https://kronos.rest/docs/
- GitHub: https://kronos.rest/github/
- Pricing: https://kronos.rest/pricing/

Important limits:
- Forecasts are uncertain and should not be treated as direct trading instructions.
- Performance depends on data quality, interval consistency, evaluation design, and market regime.
- Financial decisions require independent review and risk controls.
- Kronos AI is a forecasting workflow and decision-support layer, not a trading bot or guarantee of market outcomes.
<!-- SAAS_NAV_END -->
